instruction: The viewBox is too small — the cloud arrow up icon doesn't fit. Make it 128x128.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 64 64" width="64" height="64">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="64" height="64" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/cloud-arrow-up.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 16.5V9.75m0 0 3 3m-3-3-3 3M6.75 19.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-1.41-8.775 5.25 5.25 0 0 1 10.233-2.33 3 3 0 0 1 3.758 3.848A3.752 3.752 0 0 1 18 19.5H6.75Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/cloud-arrow-up.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 16.5V9.75m0 0 3 3m-3-3-3 3M6.75 19.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-1.41-8.775 5.25 5.25 0 0 1 10.233-2.33 3 3 0 0 1 3.758 3.848A3.752 3.752 0 0 1 18 19.5H6.75Z"/></g>
</svg>
